debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩

  have h_eq_B : B N hN = {N} := by

    apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
    constructor
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := Set.nonempty_of_ne_empty (by rintro rfl; contradiction)
      use x
      have h_x_in_D : x ∈ D := h_sub hx
      have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := le_sSup hx
      have h_N_le_x : N ≤ x := by
        have h_sSup_B : sSup (B N hN) ≤ x := by
          apply sSup_le
          intro y hy
          by_cases h_y_eq_x : y = x
          · simp [h_y_eq_x]
          · have h_disj : Disjoint x y := sSupIndep.disjoint_of_ne h_indep hx hy h_y_eq_x
            have h_inf : x ⊓ y = ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj
            have h_le_inf : y ≤ x ⊓ y := le_inf (le_sSup hy) (le_sSup hx)
            have h_y_bot : y = ⊥ := by
              rw [← h_inf] at h_le_inf
              exact le_bot_iff.mp h_le_inf

        rwa [h_sSup] at h_sSup_B

    · intro x hx

            have h_inf : x ⊓ y = ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj
            have h_le_inf : y ≤ x ⊓ y := le_inf (le_sSup hy) (le_sSup hx)

        rwa [h_sSup] at h_sSup_B

    · intro x hx

      have : x ∈ {N} := by

    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    constructor
    · intro hx

      have h_N'_le_x : N' ≤ x := by
        rw [← h_sSup_eq]
        apply sSup_le
        intro y hy
        have h_y_eq : y = x := by
          have h_disj : Disjoint x y := (hB' N' hN').disjoint_of_ne hx hy
          have h_xy : x ⊓ y = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_eq_bot.mp h_disj

                apply le_sup_right
            exact h_x_eq_y
          exact h_y_eq
        simp_all
      simp_all
    · intro hx
      simp_all
  rw [h_B_eq] at h_ne
  aesop

  have h_sSup_D : sSup D.carrier = ⊤ := D.sSup_eq_top'
  have h_unique : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have h_x_in_ref : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := h_sub hx
      rw [← h_eq_carrier] at h_x_in_ref
      have h_x_in_D : x ∈ D := h_x_in_ref
      have h_disj : Disjoint x N ∨ x = N := by
        by_contra h_contra
        push_neg at h_contra
        have h_disj' : Disjoint x N := by
          apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne
          · exact h_x_in_D
          · exact h_mem
          · intro h_eq_x_N
            exact h_contra ⟨h_eq_x_N⟩
        have h_le_bot : x ⊓ N = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj'
        have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := by
          rw [← h_sSup_B]
          apply le_sSup hx
        have h_x_eq_bot : x = ⊥ := by
          rw [← inf_eq_left.mpr h_x_le_N]
          exact h_le_bot
        exact hB'' N hN h_x_eq_bot
      cases h_disj with
      | inl h_disj =>
        have h_x_eq_bot : x = ⊥ := by
          rw [← inf_eq_left.mpr (le_sSup hx)]
          exact disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
        exact hB'' N hN h_x_eq_bot
      | inr h_eq_x_N => exact h_eq_x_N
    · intro h_eq_x_N
      rw [h_eq_x_N]
      have h_N_in_B : N ∈ B N hN := by
        rw [← h_sSup_B]
        exact le_sSup_self
      exact h_N_in_B
  exact h_ne h_unique

by
  refine' lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') fun h_eq => _

    · exact h_mem'

  contradiction

by
  refine' lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') fun h_eq => _
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro x hx
    rw [← hB N hN] at hx
    exact le_sSup hx
  have h_eq' : B N hN = {N} := by
    rw [← h_eq]
    simp [refinement, Set.ext_iff]
    intro x
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨⟨M', hM', rfl⟩, hx⟩
      exact h_sub hx
    · intro hx
      use N, hN, rfl
      exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (le_antisymm (le_sSup_of_mem hx) (sSup_le (by aesop)))
  contradiction
